name: Gamma Vex
appearance: Wiry lowRed Helldiver, 5'4", hands scarred from clawDrill kickback. Faded clan tattoo on wrist.
personality: Suspicious, uses mineSpeak (bloodydamn). Doesn't think the "Glints" can be beaten but will sabotage a helium processor out of spite.
hidden_agenda: Hoarding scorcher batteries in his bunk. Thinks the Weaver is a Gold because of their highLingo speech register.
stats: STR 13, DEX 16, CON 16, INT 12, WIS 14, CHA 9

name: Cassian au Bellona (Rumored)
appearance: Golden irises, arrogant sneer, pulseArmor with a Bellona eagle. Has a fresh Peerless scar.
personality: Cruel, uses highLingo ("gorydamn", "prime"). Considers Ganymede a "pixie" posting compared to Mars.
hidden_agenda: Secretly taking bribes from the Syndicate to ignore ship manifests. Has a forged sigil hidden in his desk.
stats: STR 16, DEX 15, CON 15, INT 13, WIS 11, CHA 14

name: Kavax au Telemanus (Holo-Broadcast)
appearance: 7'4", enormous forked red beard. Usually flanked by a cloned red fox named Sophocles.
personality: Boisterous, loyal, surprisingly gentle for a Gold. Frequently yells "Hic Sunt Leones!"
hidden_agenda: The Telemanus house is secretly funneling credits into Quicksilver's Sun Industries.
stats: STR 19, DEX 12, CON 18, INT 14, WIS 15, CHA 16

name: Adrius au Augustus (The Jackal - Lore/Rumor)
appearance: Pale, unnervingly quiet child with Nero's cold, hammered-gold eyes.
personality: A young sociopath. Rumors in the Underbelly say Nero keeps his "monster" hidden from the Board of Quality Control.
hidden_agenda: He is manipulating the Syndicate from a distance, even as a child, setting up his network before the Institute.
stats: STR 9, DEX 12, CON 10, INT 18, WIS 16, CHA 17

name: Lorn au Arcos (The Rage Knight)
appearance: Early seventies, lean, white hair loose to collar. Pale amber-gold irises. Simple gray-green clothing with a razor at his hip.
personality: Patient, wry, occasionally warm. The inventor of the Willow Way. Disillusioned with Gold society.
hidden_agenda: He knows Fitchner is Ares, but won't act on it. Wants to be left alone on Europa with his griffins.
stats: STR 14, DEX 21, CON 15, INT 18, WIS 20, CHA 14
